# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

image: docker:latest

stages:
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  DOCKER_IMAGE_NAME: $CI_PROJECT_NAME

before_script:
  - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
  - echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY" > ~/.ssh/id_rsa
  - chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
  - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
  - ssh-add ~/.ssh/id_rsa

test:
  stage: test
  script:
    - docker build -t $DOCKER_IMAGE_NAME .
    - docker run $DOCKER_IMAGE_NAME
  only:
    - main

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production"
  only:
    - main
